steps.title: Identify the growth factor
steps.content:
The number of bacteria doubles each day:
$$
2.5\cdot10^5,\ 5.0\cdot10^5,\ 1.0\cdot10^6
$$
At the end of day $3$, the count is $1.0\cdot10^6$.

steps.title: Count the needed doublings
steps.content:
Rewrite the target using the day $3$ value:
$$
5.12\cdot10^8=512\cdot10^6
$$
Since $512=2^9$, the culture needs $9$ more doublings after day $3$.

steps.title: Find the day
steps.content: Nine days after day $3$ is $$ 3+9=12 $$ The answer is D.
